untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit cointegration pair data and spread calculation between two assets. The allowed indicators do not include pair spread, cointegration coefficient, or half-life of mean reversion. Z-score is used as a proxy for spread deviation, but this is not a true cointegrated pair spread without the underlying pair construction parameters (lookback_period, hedge ratio). Critical parameters (lookback_period, threshold, half_life) marked AUTHOR_SILENT cannot be quantified.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses zscore_20 as a proxy for normalized spread deviation in a mean-reverting regime. Buy signal (entry_long) triggers when zscore < -1 (spread at low/attractive level), sell signal (entry_short) when zscore > +1 (spread at high level). Exit conditions reverse the position when spread returns toward mean (zscore crosses zero). This approximation assumes zscore is applied to the pair spread, but true cointegration analysis and pair construction cannot be represented with available indicators.
